zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion MacLean of Treshnish於1465年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾時，她的父親John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish35歲，母親Mrs. Anne MacLean35歲。她和Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean至少有2個兒子。她去世於1516年11月18日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion MacLean of Treshnish于1465年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾时，她的父亲John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish35岁，母亲Mrs. Anne MacLean35岁。她和Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean至少有2个儿子。她去世于1516年11月18日在苏格兰阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion MacLean of Treshnish was born in 1465, in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, her father, John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish, was 35 and her mother, Mrs. Anne MacLean, was 35. She had at least 2 sons with Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean. She died on 18 November 1516, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 51, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion MacLean of Treshnish est née en 1465, à Isle of Mull, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Anne MacLean, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean. Elle est décédée le 18 novembre 1516, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion MacLean of Treshnish 1465 in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish 35 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Anne MacLean 35. Sie hatte mit Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 18. November 1516 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion MacLean of Treshnish è nata il nel 1465 nel Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Anne MacLean, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean. Morì il 18 novembre 1516, nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion MacLean of Treshnishが1465年にスコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムルで生まれた時，父John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnishは35歳，母Mrs. Anne MacLeanは35歳であった。彼女はLachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLeanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1516年11月18日にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで51歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion MacLean of Treshnish(이)가 1465년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 뮐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Anne MacLean(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 11월 18일 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion MacLean of Treshnish nasceu em 1465, em Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Anne MacLean, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean. Ela faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1516, em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion MacLean of Treshnish родилась в 1465 г. в местности исл оф мулл, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Anne MacLean, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean. Она умерла 18 ноября 1516 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marion MacLean of Treshnish nació en 1465, en Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs. Anne MacLean, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1516, en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Scotland.
